textPlain: I like that the top reply to Carmack's wall of text is a screenshot of TempleOS with a doodle of an elephant lmao. And ironically, that meme reply is on topic and it says a thousand words.Another point I would ad to support that meme comment is Google's recent rug pull of Android not allowing sideloading apps from unsigned developers anymore, after over a decade of conquering the market.
